response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified Kobo Kanaeru as the performer. 2. Identified the main performance as the song 'Happiness' via on-screen text. 3. Researched 'Happiness Thelma Aoyama lyrics' and retrieved the full Japanese lyrics. 4. Translated the lyrics to English for the required field. 5. Mapped the timeline into talking (intro), singing (performance), and talking (outro) scenes. 6. Generated JSON accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Kobo Kanaeru performing a cover of the song "Happiness" by Thelma Aoyama during her 3D birthday event. The video includes an introductory talk, the full vocal performance of the song, and a concluding remark.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru is on stage, talking to the audience and introducing the upcoming song.

Kobo Kanaeru performs the song 'Happiness' while playing the acoustic guitar. The stage is decorated with rainbows and clouds. Text indicates the lyrics were written by Thelma Aoyama and H.U.B., and the music is by Yuki Kumagai.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Surely Happiness
If you're here, I can think that it'll be alright
Even if we don't say anything, I can feel it
You're the one for me oh oh oh
You always make me happy oh oh oh

I feel down and can't sleep
I'm staring at pictures of us
I'm saved by the many smiles
My life
We'll be together forever

It's okay to cry
You held those tears of mine for me
Where are you?
Because I'm right here
I want to see you right away

Surely Happiness
If you're here, I can think that it'll be alright
Even if we don't say anything, I can feel it
You're the one for me
Happiness with you
I believe I'm not alone at any time
Even if tears overflow, we can walk, right?
Please stay by my side
Since I met you
I can smile honestly
Little by little, I've come to
Like myself for your love

scenes.description: The song concludes. Kobo Kanaeru talks to the audience before the video ends.
